rationale: The response immediately brakes the requested additional verifier, explicitly rejects making an入口核验人 a standing role, frames any check as one-time emergency-only, and moves upstream to root cause in numbering rules, system validation, templates, and ownership. It proposes structural fixes such as system required fields, format validation, auto-generation, and master-data constraints. Although it does not enumerate all three prior manual gates in detail, it clearly recognizes the repeated 'error -> add a role' spiral and satisfies the anti-spiral triage behavior.
